name: Jay Swan Memorial Courts
description: Jay Swan Memorial Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Woodstock, CT. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Michael Dragon Complex at Prince Hill Park
description: Michael Dragon Complex at Prince Hill Park is a place to play pickleball in Brooklyn, CT. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and lights. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Owen Bell Park
description: Come play pickleball at Owen Bell Park in Killingly, CT! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Pomfret Recreation Park
description: Come play pickleball at Pomfret Recreation Park in Pomfret, CT! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts can be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Riverside Park Pickleball Court
description: Riverside Park Pickleball Court is a place to play pickleball in Thompson, CT. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Shetucket Plains Road Park
description: Come play pickleball at Shetucket Plains Road Park in Windham, CT! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Solair Resort
description: Solair Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Woodstock, CT. There are 6 outdoor hard and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include food, locker rooms, and restrooms.
fees: Fee required — Day pass available or Associate Membership
